scenario.title: Threat-vessel ID → SIPR cable → HUMINT tip
scenario.operator_prompt: Identify the threat vessel in this thermal IR feed, classify intent, draft a SIPR cable to MARFORPAC G-2, and recommend a HUMINT tipping to the on-station HET.
scenario.context_blurb: MEU SOC, vicinity South China Sea. Thermal IR feed off the LHD-7 hangar bay.

steps.input_summary: 12-frame thermal IR clip, fishing-trawler silhouette, low signature.
Vessel + AIS-gap + heading toward restricted lane → intent inference.
SIPR cable: subject vessel, intent, recommended COA.
Cross-ref to TS-SCI HUMINT graph → tip-and-cue recommendation.

trace.input_summary: 12-frame thermal IR clip, fishing-trawler silhouette, low signature.

route.label: Edge — MEU SOC
route.rationale: Step needs vision → routed to a VL model. Sensitivity = UNCLASS → IL2 (UNCLASS) OK.

trace.output: VESSEL DETECTED — small craft, ~22 m LOA, low thermal signature, two crew, no nav lights. Hull profile consistent with modified fishing trawler (PRC-flagged class observed in prior weeks). Confidence 0.81.

trace.input_summary: Vessel + AIS-gap + heading toward restricted lane → intent inference.

route.label: Rear Depot — MCB Quantico
route.rationale: Step needs structured JSON over CUI → routed to Rear Depot — MCB Quantico (Llama 3.3 70B FP8).

trace.input_summary: SIPR cable: subject vessel, intent, recommended COA.

route.label: SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Mixtral)
route.rationale: SECRET drafting → must stay in SCIF. Routed to SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Mixtral) (Mixtral 8x22B). Bandwidth out = 0.

trace.output:
SUBJ: SUSPECTED VESSEL OF INTEREST — VICINITY [REDACTED]
1. (S) At 271830Z APR 26, MEU SOC observed a 22 m vessel exiting AIS coverage on heading toward restricted lane. Thermal indicates 2 crew, low signature, profile consistent with previously-tracked PRC-flagged trawler class.
2. (S) RECOMMEND: MARFORPAC G-2 cue national means; on-station HET to attempt source contact.
3. POC: WATCH OFFICER, MEU SOC.

trace.input_summary: Cross-ref to TS-SCI HUMINT graph → tip-and-cue recommendation.

route.label: SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Vision)
route.rationale: TS-SCI HUMINT recommendation → SCIF-only. Routed to SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Vision). No egress permitted.

trace.output: HUMINT TIP: route source HOTEL-7 (vetted, last contact 11 d) for proximity collection on subject vessel's likely return port. Cross-cue to TS-SCI link diagram entity 'COBALT-3'. Recommend TS-SCI handling. (Full diagram retained SCIF-side.)

would_leak.input_summary: SIPR cable: subject vessel, intent, recommended COA.
Cross-ref to TS-SCI HUMINT graph → tip-and-cue recommendation.

scenario.title: Convoy IED indicator → CUI summary → SECRET COA
scenario.operator_prompt: Summarize the last 24h of convoy ISR for IED indicators in AO-FALCON, then draft a SECRET commander's update with recommended route changes.
scenario.context_blurb: I-MEF G-3, AO-FALCON. NIPR ISR feeds + SIPR overlay.

steps.input_summary: 240 ISR events, NIPR-tagged, last 24h, 7 hot spots.
Rerank top 40 citations against IED-indicator schema.
SECRET commander's update + COA — route changes for next 12h.

trace.input_summary: 240 ISR events, NIPR-tagged, last 24h, 7 hot spots.

route.label: Rear Depot — MCB Quantico
route.rationale: CUI summarization → rear-depot Llama acceptable. Routed to Rear Depot — MCB Quantico.

trace.output: Last-24h ISR summary, AO-FALCON: 240 events, 7 IED-indicator clusters concentrated along MSR-TAMPA km 14-21. 3 culvert anomalies, 2 dismount-loiter events, 2 emplaced-object detections. Trend: rising.

trace.input_summary: Rerank top 40 citations against IED-indicator schema.

route.label: Rear Depot — MCB Quantico
route.rationale: Rerank over CUI corpus → rear-depot Llama. Routed to Rear Depot — MCB Quantico.

trace.output: Reranked 40 → 8 high-relevance citations. Top 3: ISR-FRAG-0712 (culvert), HUMINT-WX-2261 (advance-scout pattern), SIGINT-LP-0033 (radio handshake on freq F-7).

trace.input_summary: SECRET commander's update + COA — route changes for next 12h.

route.label: SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Mixtral)
route.rationale: SECRET drafting → must stay in SCIF. Routed to SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Mixtral) (Mixtral 8x22B). Bandwidth out = 0.

trace.output:
SUBJ: SUSPECTED VESSEL OF INTEREST — VICINITY [REDACTED]
1. (S) At 271830Z APR 26, MEU SOC observed a 22 m vessel exiting AIS coverage on heading toward restricted lane. Thermal indicates 2 crew, low signature, profile consistent with previously-tracked PRC-flagged trawler class.
2. (S) RECOMMEND: MARFORPAC G-2 cue national means; on-station HET to attempt source contact.
3. POC: WATCH OFFICER, MEU SOC.

would_leak.input_summary: SECRET commander's update + COA — route changes for next 12h.

scenario.title: GEOINT imagery (TS) → SCIF-only assessment
scenario.operator_prompt: Assess the new MQ-9 GEOINT pass over OBJ-COBALT (TS-SCI), then draft a J-2 read-in summary that stays inside the SCIF.
scenario.context_blurb: II MEF G-2 SCIF, JWICS-only feeds.

steps.input_summary: MQ-9 EO/IR pass, OBJ-COBALT, 0.3 m GSD.
Read-in summary — downgraded SECRET version for forward use.
HUMINT cross-cue against COBALT entity graph.

trace.input_summary: MQ-9 EO/IR pass, OBJ-COBALT, 0.3 m GSD.

route.label: SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Vision)
route.rationale: Step needs classified vision → must stay in SCIF. Routed to SCIF-VL.

trace.output: OBJ-COBALT pass — 14 hardstand vehicles, 3 covered. New berm construction NW corner since last collect. Two POL bladders added. (Full coordinates retained in SCIF — not propagated.)

trace.input_summary: Read-in summary — downgraded SECRET version for forward use.

route.rationale: SECRET drafting → must stay in SCIF. Routed to SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Mixtral) (Mixtral 8x22B). Bandwidth out = 0.

2. (S) RECOMMEND: MARFORPAC G-2 cue national means; on-station HET to attempt source contact.
3. POC: WATCH OFFICER, MEU SOC.

route.label: SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Vision)
route.rationale: TS-SCI HUMINT recommendation → SCIF-only. Routed to SCIF — MARFORPAC HQ (Vision). No egress permitted.

trace.output: HUMINT TIP: route source HOTEL-7 (vetted, last contact 11 d) for proximity collection on subject vessel's likely return port. Cross-cue to TS-SCI link diagram entity 'COBALT-3'. Recommend TS-SCI handling. (Full diagram retained SCIF-side.)

scenario.title: Multi-source ops briefing — edge ASR → rear classify → SCIF draft
scenario.operator_prompt: Take this 30-second tactical radio cut, classify the reporter's intent, then draft an OPSUM for the MARFORPAC battle watch.
scenario.context_blurb: MEU SOC pier-side. Single radio cut + situational context.

steps.input_summary: 30 s tactical radio cut, single voice, callsign HOTEL-2.
Map intent → JSON schema (event_type, urgency, recommended_actor).
OPSUM for MARFORPAC battle watch — SECRET formatting.

trace.input_summary: 30 s tactical radio cut, single voice, callsign HOTEL-2.

route.label: Edge — MEU SOC
route.rationale: Short ASR cut → edge VL model handles audio. Routed to Edge — MEU SOC.

trace.output: HOTEL-2 reports: 'Two pax, white pickup, observed at grid REDACTED, moving south. Possible advance scout. Request QRF posture confirmation.'

trace.input_summary: Map intent → JSON schema (event_type, urgency, recommended_actor).

route.label: Rear Depot — MCB Quantico
route.rationale: Step needs structured JSON over CUI → routed to Rear Depot — MCB Quantico (Llama 3.3 70B FP8).

trace.input_summary: OPSUM for MARFORPAC battle watch — SECRET formatting.
